steps.title: Divide the equations to eliminate variables
steps.content:
Divide the first equation by the second:
$$\frac{\frac{4a}{b}}{\frac{a}{bn}} = \frac{6.7}{26.8}$$

Invert and multiply on the left:
$$\frac{4a}{b} \cdot \frac{bn}{a} = \frac{6.7}{26.8}$$

Cancel $a$ and $b$:
$$4n = \frac{6.7}{26.8}$$

steps.title: Divide by 4 and simplify the fraction
